# RENICE(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  renice — alter priority of a running process

## SYNOPSIS
  renice <priority> -p <pid>

## DESCRIPTION
Changes the scheduling priority of an already-running process.

## EXAMPLES
  renice -5 -p 1337
  renice 10 -p 921

## SEE ALSO
  nice, kill, ps, top
